title: OCX Index Package Root
description: Hot, mutable package root at /p/<namespace>/<package>.json (ADR: adr_locked_observation_index_format.md D2). Governance fields (name, repository, owners, status, deprecated_message, superseded_by, created, upstream) are human-set via PR; desc and tags[*] (except tags[*].yanked) are bot-regenerated from observed registry state.

repository.description: Physical OCI repository this entry points to, oci://<host>/<repo path>. Host is validated against an allowlist at CI time (ADR: adr_index_bot_and_workflow_security.md) — this pattern only fixes the URI shape.

superseded_by.description: Human-governed pointer to the successor package, bare <namespace>/<package> (no ocx.sh/ prefix). Omitted (or null) when unset.

created.description: Date the entry was first claimed, set once.

upstream.description: Attribution of the real upstream vendor/project the namespace names. Mandatory (by governance, not by this schema) on every entry whose namespace names a real third-party vendor; omitted only for OCX's own first-party namespaces (ADR: adr_namespace_policy.md ND-9/ND-10).

desc.description: Nullable — a package that has never published __ocx.desc on the physical registry has desc: null (ADR: adr_locked_observation_index_format.md D6).

tags.description: Every tag ever observed on the physical repository, no filtering. Two tags are aliases of each other exactly when their content digests are equal (emergent aliasing, no declared aliases field).

sha256Digest.description: OCI-style content digest, algorithm sha256, lowercase hex.

zAnchoredTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC instant, Z-anchored and fixed-width (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ) — deliberately tighter than bare `format: date-time`, which also admits numeric-offset forms like `+02:00`. Every timestamp in this schema shares this one fixed shape on purpose: `core/render.py`'s `generated` field is a lexicographic string max over every `observed`/`yanked.at` value, valid only when every candidate string shares this exact shape (lexicographic order == chronological order). Offsets are deliberately excluded, not merely unhandled. Enforced at the input boundary by `core/validate_entry.py`'s `check_tag_timestamps_z_anchored` (bare JSON Schema cannot itself express 'reject only the numeric-offset form of an otherwise-valid RFC 3339 date-time').

github.description: GitHub login, human-readable display only — not the ownership key.

github_id.description: Numeric GitHub user id. Mandatory: survives GitHub username rename/recycling, unlike the login string.

upstream.description: Attribution of the real upstream vendor the namespace names, distinct from the namespace owner (owners[]).

digest.description: Digest of the currently observed __ocx.desc internal tag, used to detect change and avoid gratuitous re-copy.

keywords.description: Sourced from the sh.ocx.keywords annotation; packages that never publish it render [].

readme.description: CAS digest of the copied readme blob (o/sha256/<hex>.md).

logo.description: CAS digest of the copied logo blob (o/sha256/<hex>.svg or .png).

content.description: Digest of the observation object in this index's own package-local CAS — not an OCI manifest or image-index digest.

yanked.description: Presence marks the row yanked. Human-set via PR; bot never writes this field.
